use_cases: Displaying error messages that require user acknowledgment before dismissing
Confirmation dialogs before destructive actions like deletions or data loss
Form validation feedback requiring user attention
Critical system alerts that interrupt workflow until resolved
ai_summary: A modal overlay dialog built on Radix UI primitives featuring smooth fade and zoom animations for enter/exit transitions. The component includes a semi-transparent backdrop overlay, centered content positioning, and responsive design with rounded corners and shadow effects. Designed primarily for error alerts and critical notifications requiring user acknowledgment.
